mission: Map how target personas discover and consent — not cold contact

owner_disclosure.owner_mission: Digital consent paths for affluent DMV med-spa clients
owner_disclosure.bias_statement: This cat is owned by Work Smarter Digital and may favor CRM and consent-native paths.

angle_1.thesis: Review platforms surface experience themes (service quality, wait times, results).

angle_2.thesis: Community threads emphasize questions, skepticism, and rejected outreach patterns.
angle_2.contradicts_angle_1: Reviews optimize for outcomes; forums optimize for trust and process.

angle_3.thesis: News and secondary web sources add reputation and local context.

evidence.quote_or_summary: Empowered Women: The Rise of Moksha Aesthetics    Modern Luxury
evidence.title: Empowered Women: The Rise of Moksha Aesthetics - Modern Luxury

evidence.title: SEV Medspa's First MD Location Opens - Patch

evidence.title: A Guide to the Best Spas Around DC - Washingtonian

evidence.quote_or_summary: The Top Spots for Facials and Massages in the DMV    Modern Luxury
evidence.title: The Top Spots for Facials and Massages in the DMV - Modern Luxury

angle_3.lens: Regional press and discovered forum/blog pages

stuck_trap: Buy contact lists or cold-DM affluent zip residents from review scrapes.

ranked_paths: Consent-native discovery (user-initiated search and spa-owned nurture)
Community-informed FAQ and objection handling on owned channels
Partnership with local trust anchors (studios, physicians) — verify manually
recommendation.human_decision_needed: Which path matches Potomac Skin Care brand and legal boundaries?

do_not_do: Scrape login-walled neighborhoods (Nextdoor, private Facebook groups)
Treat review snippets as opted-in marketing contacts
